name: python3-schema
title: python3-schema
description:
simple data validation library (Python 3)
Schema is a library for validating Python data structures, such as those
obtained from config-files, forms, external services or command-line parsing,
converted from JSON/YAML (or something else) to Python data-types.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-schema because simple data validation library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-schema as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-schema with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-schema --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
